name: Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs until foamy.
2. Add vanilla extract and mix well.
3. Stir in baking soda and salt.
4. Gradually add oil and mix for 1 minute.
5. Fold in flour alternately with banana mixture until just combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Let cool slightly before glazing with powdered sugar mixed with lemon juice to desired consistency.
NOTE: Makes a really moist cake.
